problem id: a4770481
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  11101101 -> 10111111
  10110001 -> 00111110
  00000101 -> 10100001
  00101110 -> 11001111
  11011100 -> 10111111
  11110010 -> 01111110
  10101000 -> 00111111
  00101010 -> 01001111
  11000010 -> 01111000
  10110011 -> 01111110

query: 00011100
predicted answer: 10000111
